articles.summary: Hi HN, I built this because I wanted to see if I could pre-train large-vocabulary LLMs (like Gemma with 262k tokens) on hardware accessible to independent researchers.Standard exact Cross-Entropy instantly OOMs on 16GB GPUs at that scale.To bypass this, I implemented MAXIS Loss.
